meta.title: Sinking up to 80 ships with a SINGLE stealth bomber?!
meta.description:
Earlier this year, we discussed the Air Force Research Lab’s new 2,000-pound anti-ship bomb dubbed “Quicksink,” which sent an aircraft-carrier-sized target to the bottom of the Pacific with just a single shot last summer. Now, the U.S. Air Force is testing yet another similar weapon from its Stealth Bombers, a 500-pound version of the Quicksink, that could allow a single B-2 Spirit to engage as many as 80 smaller warships in just a single sortie.
